rationale: Multiple curl processes (A0, EV-002, EV-004, EV-006) were spawned by cmd.exe, all attempting to download a DLL from a GitHub raw content URL. These DLLs are being saved to various suspicious locations including C:\Users\Public\Music\, C:\ProgramData\, and the user's temporary directory (EV-001, EV-003, EV-005, EV-007). This behavior is indicative of an attempt to establish persistence or execute malicious code.
